column1: Alternative Names – Cross-cultural variants (e.g., Samael = Satanel, Iblis = Shaytan).
Iconography – Visual depictions (e.g., Lilith as winged seductress, Sandalphon as a giant).
Feast Days – Liturgical recognition (e.g., Michaelmas for Michael & Raphael).
Cultural Adaptations – Modern reinterpretations (e.g., Lilith in feminism, Azazel in occultism).
Associated Texts – Primary sources (e.g., Quran for Harut & Marut, Dead Sea Scrolls for Belial).
